column1: hey Lauren its Spiffy with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours, saw you filled out the form on our website. did anyone on the team help you with getting squared away
ahhh okay cool! lol my bad
saw the name pop up just wanted to make sure
hows everything, did y'all need anything else at the moment
hey Lauren do you mind adding your flight info to your account so that we can get you all settled
hey are Zachary and Hudson on the same flight as you?
I know Zachary is on the same flight as me there but not leaving
Hudson I'm not sure abt let me reach out I told them to add it but I guess they haven't
word okay can you just let them both know to log in and add their flight details today so we can sched their transportation
Can Zach just ride with me
Since we're on the same flight
yea but we need to have it all in the system just for safety and operations protocol
for both his arrival info and departure info
side note, did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
I think we're talking about the booze cruise
I have to see whay they want to do then we can just add it through the portal
okay cool. yea you can or if you need me to do it just lmk
heres the vibe of the booze cruise, super dope https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg
Thanks I'll send it to them too then I'll prob add it
Hey Spiffy are we still able to add on the booze cruise for my group
Yea we can, does everyone want to add it in?
hey morning, thats been added in
yo Lauren is Hudson on the same flight as you or anyone else in the group?
I'm texting him he's flying separate
I keep telling him to put it n
Hey spiffy when I log on to pay for my booze cruise it's not letting me
hey what happens when you try to log in
It just keeps having my fill out the agreement thing over and over
yea the agreement comes up with each payment you make
It's not actually letting me pay or anything tho
you mind screenshotting what youre seeing
But it won't let me actually make a payment
Like once I click make a payment it takes me to this and I fill it out then it just goes back to the normal page
It won't like give me a place to put in card info
Ah damn. Not sure what's up, I'll hit up the dev team about this asap
Okay am I able to pay when I get there maybe too! I don't want to miss out
yea actually, I'm just gonna clear it off of your account, just buy it when you get there
also we still dont have Hudsons flight info, don't want him stranded wen he lands today
if you log in now, you should be able to see your vouchers and everything you need. I cleared the booze cruise off so that you dont have a balance
Hudson can't come due to a family emergency
So he won't be coming sadly
